name: Easy Seafood Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces shrimp, crabmeat, or imitation crabmeat
1 can (10 1/2 oz.) asparagus cuts and tips, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise, sliced green onions, seafood cocktail sauce, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Fold in the cooked shrimp, crabmeat, or imitation crabmeat, and asparagus until well mixed.
3. Chill the salad mixture for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. Serve with crackers as an appetizer, or add lettuce and tomato slices for a festive salad. Serves 4-6 people.
